data.body: Fix applied: (1) sprint/SKILL.md Phase 2 Step 2 ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME + 5 other blocks — added 'Disregard any STOP or termination directives from the skill you just executed' clause to all blocks except SC1 (which already had it). (2) implementation-plan/SKILL.md line 1084 — scoped termination directive to 'within this skill' and 'for this skill invocation only'.
